title: Update module github.com/opencontainers/cgroups to v0.0.6
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/opencontainers/cgroups](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups) | `v0.0.5` -> `v0.0.6` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fcgroups/v0.0.6?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fcgroups/v0.0.5/v0.0.6?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>opencontainers/cgroups (github.com/opencontainers/cgroups)</summary>

### [`v0.0.6`](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/releases/tag/v0.0.6)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/compare/v0.0.5...v0.0.6)

#### What's Changed

- config: switch PidsLimit to \*int64 by [@​cyphar](https://redirect.github.com/cyphar) in [#​48](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/48)
- fs2: add iocost statistics by [@​tiljeset](https://redirect.github.com/tiljeset) in [#​43](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/43)
- systemd: retry when the dbus connection returns EAGAIN by [@​jianghao65536](https://redirect.github.com/jianghao65536) in [#​45](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/45)
- fs: fix/improve cpuacct.usage\_all parsing by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​50](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/50)

#### New Contributors

- [@​cyphar](https://redirect.github.com/cyphar) made their first contribution in [#​48](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/48)
- [@​tiljeset](https://redirect.github.com/tiljeset) made their first contribution in [#​43](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/43)
- [@​jianghao65536](https://redirect.github.com/jianghao65536) made their first contribution in [#​45](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/45)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/compare/v0.0.5...v0.0.6>
Signed-off-by: Aleksa Sarai <cyphar@cyphar.com>

</details>
